feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to get authorisations in abap for BTP trial (solved)
entry.content:
Hi guys, got btp trial and have an abap trial instance. It allows login to Fiori as well.
But I have very very limited access it seems.
I now figured out i need to assign zlocal as superpackage and then I can create packages.
Looks like my issue with sql console in eclipse is that the normal netweaver tables either dont exist or I just dont and wont have access to them.

entry.title: Business Application Studio COnnection error
entry.content:
In the past, we could connect from BAS to our BTP ABAP system.
Now we get this error below.

The destination works says it connects in SAP BTP Cockpit.
I even tried a Destination create by Build Studio.
In BAS CF login says connected.    

Why is the discovery process now failing ?


{
  "cause": {
    "cause": {
      "cause": {
        "message": "Cannot retrieve services. - Request failed with status code 500",
        "name": "AxiosError",
        "stack": "AxiosError: Request failed with status code 500     at tt (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:3259268)     at IncomingMessage.<anonymous> (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:3272336)     at IncomingMessage.emit (node:events:531:35)     at endReadableNT (node:internal/streams/readable:1698:12)     at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:90:21)     at cr.request (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:3284945)     at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:105:5)",
        "config": {
          "transitional": {
            "silentJSONParsing": true,
            "forcedJSONParsing": true,
            "clarifyTimeoutError": false
          },
          "adapter": [
            "xhr",
            "http",
            "fetch"
          ],
          "transformRequest": [
            null
          ],
          "transformResponse": [
            null
          ],
          "timeout": 40000,
          "xsrfCookieName": "XSRF-TOKEN",
          "xsrfHeaderName": "X-XSRF-TOKEN",
          "maxContentLength": -1,
          "maxBodyLength": -1,
          "env": {},
          "headers": {
            "Accept": "application/json, text/plain, */*",
            "User-Agent": "service-provider",
            "Accept-Encoding": "gzip, compress, deflate, br"
          },
          "url": "https://oxdevmainaws.eu10cf.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/destinations/abap-cloud-oxdevabapenv-oxando-gmbh_oxdevmainaws-devcf/sap/opu/odata4/iwfnd/config/default/iwfnd/catalog/0002/ServiceGroups?$expand=DefaultSystem($expand=Services)",
          "method": "get",
          "responseType": "json",
          "proxy": {
            "port": 8887,
            "host": "127.0.0.1",
            "protocol": "http:"
          },
          "allowAbsoluteUrls": true
        },
        "code": "ERR_BAD_RESPONSE",
        "status": 500
      },
      "code": 602,
      "name": "ServiceProviderError",
      "originalCause": 500
    },
    "code": 602,
    "name": "ServiceProviderError"
  },
  "code": 602,
  "label": "service-center",
  "level": "error",
  "message": "Data retrieval error: Cannot get services. - Data retrieval error: retrieveServices fails with - Data retrieval error: Cannot retrieve services. - Request failed with status code 500. Status code: 500. Data retrieval error: Cannot get services. - Data retrieval error: retrieveServices fails with - Data retrieval error: Cannot retrieve services. - Request failed with status code 500",
  "name": "ServiceProviderError",
  "stack": "ServiceProviderError: Data retrieval error: Cannot get services. - Data retrieval error: retrieveServices fails with - Data retrieval error: Cannot retrieve services. - Request failed with status code 500     at t.handleProviderError (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:3646812)     at t.SubaccountDestinationProviderSystem.<anonymous> (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:1852328)     at Generator.throw (<anonymous>)     at a (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:1851604)     at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:105:5) Caused By: ServiceProviderError: Data retrieval error: retrieveServices fails with - Data retrieval error: Cannot retrieve services. - Request failed with status code 500     at t.handleProviderError (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:3646812)     at d.<anonymous> (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:2377411)     at Generator.throw (<anonymous>)     at a (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:2376625)     at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:105:5) Caused By: ServiceProviderError: Data retrieval error: Cannot retrieve services. - Request failed with status code 500     at t.handleProviderError (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:3646812)     at d.<anonymous> (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:2380906)     at Generator.throw (<anonymous>)     at a (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:2376625)     at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:105:5) Caused By: AxiosError: Request failed with status code 500     at tt (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:3259268)     at IncomingMessage.<anonymous> (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:3272336)     at IncomingMessage.emit (node:events:531:35)     at endReadableNT (node:internal/streams/readable:1698:12)     at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:90:21)     at cr.request (/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/service-catalog-1.4.0/dist/extension.js:2:3284945)     at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:105:5)",
  "time": "2026-01-13T07:57:50.280Z"
}
{
  "label": "service-center",
  "level": "error",
  "message": "Could not get v2 and v4 services for 'abap-cloud-oxdevabapenv-oxando-gmbh_oxdevmainaws-devcf'.",
  "time": "2026-01-13T07:57:52.050Z"
}

entry.title: Operations not getting created from BAPI_ROUTING_CREATE even though routing is getting generated
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am calling BAPI to create routing as shown below and passing the following data. The routing is getting created without any errors, but operations are not getting created. Can someone please suggest how this can be fixed. The same data when passed from SE37, operations are getting created.

P.S: I have already tried leading 0's in sequence, group counter, activity.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_ROUTING_CREATE'
      EXPORTING
        testrun                = lv_testrun
*        profile                = 'PI01'
        bomusage               = '1'
        application            = 'PP01'
      IMPORTING
        group                  = lv_group
        groupcounter           = lv_groupcounter
      TABLES
        task                   = lt_tsk
        materialtaskallocation = lt_mtk
        sequence               = lt_seq
        operation              = lt_opr
        suboperation           = lt_sbo
        referenceoperation     = lt_rfo
        workcenterreference    = lt_wcr
        componentallocation    = lt_com
        productionresource     = lt_prt
        inspcharacteristic     = lt_cha
        textallocation         = lt_txt
*       text                   = text[]
        return                 = lt_return[]
      EXCEPTIONS
        error_message          = 1
        OTHERS                 = 2.


    LOOP AT lt_return WHERE type CA 'EAX'. ENDLOOP.

    IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.
    ELSE.
      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT' EXPORTING wait = 'X'.
    ENDIF.

BAPI FieldTASK_LIST_GROUPGROUP_COUNTERCHANGE_NOVALID_FROMCHANGE_NO_TOVALID_TO_DATEDEL_INDTASK_LIST_USAGEPLANTTASK_LIST_STATUSTASK_MEASURE_UNITTASK_MEASURE_UNIT_ISOLOT_SIZE_FROMLOT_SIZE_TORESP_PLANNER_GROUPDESCRIPTIONOLD_NUMBER_OF_TASK_LISTRECALC_STD_VALUESDYN_MODIF_LEVELDYN_MODIF_RULEDYN_MODIF_BY_VENDORDYN_MODIF_BY_MANUFACTDYN_MODIF_BY_CUSTOMRSAMPLE_DRAWING_PROCEDUREIND_UNITS_EXT_NUMBERINGIDENT_KEYINSPPOINT_PARTIALLOT_ASSGNMTCHANGE_RULEOBJECT_CHANGE_TYPEPLANNING_WORK_CENTER
 500000611 20260113 99991231 1PE014KG 1999999999 SFG005 TEST             

 

 

MATERIALPLANTTASK_LIST_GROUPGROUP_COUNTERCHANGE_NOVALID_FROMCHANGE_NO_TOVALID_TO_DATEDEL_INDDOC_NUMBERITM_NUMBERWORK_BREAKDOWN_STRUCT_ELEMENTMATERIAL_EXTERNALMATERIAL_GUIDMATERIAL_VERSION
SFG05PE01500000611 20260113 99991231  0 SFG05 

 

 

TASK_LIST_GROUPGROUP_COUNTERSEQUENCE_NOCHANGE_NOVALID_FROMCHANGE_NO_TOVALID_TO_DATEDEL_INDACTIVITYOPERATION_IDCONTROL_KEYOBJ_IDOBJECT_TYPE_CIM_RESOURCEWORK_CNTRPLANTSTANDARD_TEXT_KEYDESCRIPTIONOPERATION_MEASURE_UNITOPERATION_MEASURE_UNIT_ISODENOMINATORNOMINATORBASE_QUANTITYBREAK_TIMEBREAK_UNITBREAK_UNIT_ISOACTTYPE_01STD_UNIT_01STD_UNIT_01_ISOSTD_VALUE_01ACTTYPE_02STD_UNIT_02STD_UNIT_02_ISOSTD_VALUE_02ACTTYPE_03STD_UNIT_03STD_UNIT_03_ISOSTD_VALUE_03ACTTYPE_04STD_UNIT_04STD_UNIT_04_ISOSTD_VALUE_04ACTTYPE_05STD_UNIT_05STD_UNIT_05_ISOSTD_VALUE_05ACTTYPE_06STD_UNIT_06STD_UNIT_06_ISOSTD_VALUE_06STD_VALUE_CALCULATION_TYPESTD_VALUE_YEAR_OF_CALCULATIONSTD_VALUE_CODE_REFERENCE_NOSTD_VALUE_CALCULATION_BASISNO_OF_CONFIRMATION_SLIPSNO_OF_TIME_TICKETSWAGETYPESUITABILITYNO_OF_EMPLOYEESETUP_GROUP_CATEGORYSETUP_GROUP_KEYSETUP_TYPE_KEYSCRAP_FACTORWAGEGROUPREQUIRED_OVERLAPPINGOPTIONAL_OVERLAPPINGIND_CONT_FLOW_PRODUCTIONMIN_OVERLAP_TIME_UNITMIN_OVERLAP_TIME_UNIT_ISOMIN_OVERLAP_TIMEMIN_SEND_AHEAD_QTYIND_SPLITTING_REQRDMAX_NO_OF_SPLITSMIN_PROCESSING_TIME_UNITMIN_PROCESSING_TIME_UNIT_ISOMIN_PROCESSING_TIMEMAX_WAIT_TIME_UNITMAX_WAIT_TIME_UNIT_ISOMAX_WAIT_TIMEREQUIRED_WAIT_TIME_UNITREQUIRED_WAIT_TIME_UNIT_ISOREQUIRED_WAIT_TIMESTANDARD_QUEUE_TIME_UNITSTANDARD_QUEUE_TIME_UNIT_ISOSTANDARD_QUEUE_TIMEMIN_QUEUE_TIME_UNITMIN_QUEUE_TIME_UNIT_ISOMIN_QUEUE_TIMESTANDARD_MOVE_TIME_UNITSTANDARD_MOVE_TIME_UNIT_ISOSTANDARD_MOVE_TIMEMIN_MOVE_TIME_UNITMIN_MOVE_TIME_UNIT_ISOMIN_MOVE_TIMETEARDOWN_AND_WAIT_INDREDUCTION_STRATEGYSORTED_BYVENDOR_NOPLND_DELRYINFO_REC_NET_PRICEPRICE_UNITCOST_ELEMCURRENCYCURRENCY_ISOINFO_RECPURCH_ORGPURCH_GROUPFIXED_LOT_EXT_PROCESS_INDMATL_GROUPUSERFIELDS_KEYWORD_IDUSERFIELD_CH20_00USERFIELD_CH20_01USERFIELD_CH10_02USERFIELD_CH10_03USERFIELD_QUAN_04USERFIELD_UNIT_04USERFIELD_UNIT_04_ISOUSERFIELD_QUAN_05USERFIELD_UNIT_05USERFIELD_UNIT_05_ISOUSERFIELD_CURR_06USERFIELD_CURRENCY_06USERFIELD_CURRENCY_06_ISOUSERFIELD_CURR_07USERFIELD_CURRENCY_07USERFIELD_CURRENCY_07_ISOUSERFIELD_DATE_08USERFIELD_DATE_09USERFIELD_FLAG_10USERFIELD_FLAG_11COST_RELEVANTPO_NUMBERPO_ITEMCO_BUSPROCCUMULATION_TYPESUB_ACT_NOT_IN_ORDER_INDEXT_PROC_WITH_SUBCONTRACT_INDINSPTYPERECORDING_VIEWFREE_GRIDTIME_GRIDQUANT_GRIDQUANTONCETIME_UNITTIME_UNIT_ISOTIME_FACTORQTY_BTW_TWO_INSPECTIONSQUANT_UNITQUANT_UNIT_ISOSTOCK_RELATED_PARTIAL_LOT_ASSGINSP_POINT_COMPLT_FLOW_VARIANTGROUP_OPERATION
5000006110 20260113 99991231 10 PP01  FW_01PE01 TEST RUN1KG 115      10.000   51.000                                                                                                                      
5000006110 20260113 99991231 20 PP01  FW_01PE01 TEST RUN22KG 115      12.000   55.000

entry.title: Looking for Expert and Community Insights on My SAP Technical Journey
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I hope you are all doing well.

I would like to kindly ask for your feedback and professional insights regarding my current learning journey within the SAP Technical domain. My goal is to continuously improve my technical profile and ensure that my learning path aligns well with real-world SAP projects and current market expectations.

Below is a brief overview of my learning direction and the reasoning behind each focus area.


SAP Technical Learning Direction At this stage, my primary focus is on pursuing the SAP Technical track. I am currently concentrating on SAP Basis, aiming to build a strong and solid foundation in SAP system administration, core architecture, and operational concepts.
In parallel, I am expanding my knowledge across several complementary technical areas, as outlined below:


SAP HANA
My objective is to gain a clear and comprehensive understanding of SAP HANA database architecture and how SAP systems interact with the database layer in terms of structure, performance optimization, and system integration.


SAP ABAP
I am working on building a solid understanding of the ABAP stack, with a focus on how development processes are designed and implemented within SAP systems. This helps me better understand system logic, debugging, and collaboration with development teams from a technical perspective.


SAP CPI (Cloud Integration)
My focus includes understanding SAP’s transition from traditional on-premise environments to cloud-based platforms, along with cloud integration concepts such as internal (A2A) and external (B2B) integration scenarios.

Additionally, I have complemented this learning path with the Apache Camel Framework, due to its importance and relevance within SAP integration solutions.


SAP UI5 / Fiori & SAP BTP CAPM
Recently, SAP introduced important updates related to both frontend and backend development models. I have been exploring these updates and following commonly recommended learning resources to better understand the modern SAP development approach, including CAP-based application development.


Learning Approach
Overall, I am intentionally following a structured and methodical learning sequence to build a holistic understanding of SAP Architecture as an integrated enterprise platform, rather than focusing on individual tools or isolated technologies.


Current Learning Path & Courses
Below are the main courses I am currently following (via Udemy):

SAP NetWeaver Fundamentals

SAP Basis Administration

SAP HANA Administration

Apache Camel Framework with Spring Boot

SAP Cloud Integration (CI / CPI), including API Management and Event Mesh

SAP UI5 / Fiori Full Stack with TypeScript / JavaScript using SAP BTP RAPM / CAPM


I would truly appreciate your feedback on whether this learning path is well-structured and aligned with real-world SAP implementations, and whether there are any key areas you would recommend adding, adjusting, or prioritizing differently.

Thank you in advance for your time and valuable insights.

Best regards,

entry.title: Journal Entry Registration in BOI
entry.content:
Hello, I have a question regarding journal entry registration using BOI.

While entries not involving PL accounts register normally, attempting to register entries involving PL accounts results in an error.

How should I modify the code?

Code that registers correctly

    APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_je_deep ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<je_deep>).

    <je_deep>-%cid = lv_cid.
    <je_deep>-%param = VALUE #(
      companycode                 = '1510'
      documentreferenceid         = 'BKPFF'
      businesstransactiontype     = 'RFBU'
      accountingdocumenttype      = 'SA'
      createdbyuser               = 'test'
      documentdate                = '20260122'    " Use today's date
      postingdate                 = '20260122'    " Use today's date
     taxdeterminationdate         = '20260122'
     TaxFulfillmentDate    = '20260122'

      accountingdocumentheadertext = 'RAP test'


     _glitems = VALUE #(
    ( glaccountlineitem = '001'
      glaccount = '0010010000'
      _currencyamount = VALUE #(
      ( currencyrole = '00'
        journalentryitemamount = -100
        currency = 'JPY' ) ) )

    ( glaccountlineitem = '002'
      glaccount = '0010010000'
      _currencyamount = VALUE #(
     ( currencyrole = '00'
       journalentryitemamount = 50
       currency = 'JPY' ) ) )

    ( glaccountlineitem = '003'
      glaccount = '0010010000'
      _currencyamount = VALUE #(
     ( currencyrole = '00'
       journalentryitemamount = 50
       currency = 'JPY' ) ) )
     )
   ).

Unregisterable PL account codes.

    " Journal Entry Data Preparation
    APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_je_deep ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<je_deep>).

    <je_deep>-%cid = lv_cid.
    <je_deep>-%param = VALUE #(
      companycode                 = '1510'
      businesstransactiontype     = 'RFBU'
      accountingdocumenttype      = 'SA'
      documentdate                = '20260123'    " Use today's date
      postingdate                 = '20260123'    " Use today's date
      taxDeterminationDate        = '20260123'    " Use today's date
      accountingdocumentheadertext = 'RAP test'

   "　Statement
    _glitems = VALUE #(
    ( glaccountlineitem = '001'
      glaccount  = '0061005000'
      costcenter = '0015101101'
      taxcode    = 'V3'
      _currencyamount = VALUE #(
      ( currencyrole = '00'
        journalentryitemamount = 10000
        currency = 'JPY' ) ) )

    ( glaccountlineitem = '002'
      glaccount = '0010010000'
      _currencyamount = VALUE #(
     ( currencyrole = '00'
       journalentryitemamount = -11000
       currency = 'JPY' ) )
     )
     )
   ).

entry.title: How can I allow a communication user to schedule a background job?
entry.content:
In BTP ABAP Environment, I have a communication user that needs to schedule a background job while it is handling an inbound call to a custom OData V4 API service. The scheduling fails because the communication user is not authorized to schedule the particular background job. It's failing at an authorization check of the communication user on S_START with:

  • AUTHPGMID = R3TR
  • AUTHOBJTYP = SAJC
  • AUTHOBJNAM = The application job catalog

It's not possible to add S_START to the communication scenario that is used to access the service. How can I give the communication user the authorization to schedule the job?

entry.title: SAP BTP HTML5 App asking login again and again
entry.content:
Hello Community,
I have recently started working with RAP programming and successfully developed a Fiori application using CDS views, OData services, and annotation-based UI. The app was generated using the Fiori Generator in SAP Business Application Studio, and the preview runs without any issues.
I then deployed the application to Cloud Foundry in SAP BTP. The deployment completed successfully, and I can see the app listed under the HTML5 Applications section. However, when I try to access the app, I am repeatedly prompted with a browser login dialog. Even after providing my valid BTP credentials, the prompt continues to reappear, preventing me from accessing the application.
I have followed the same steps as outlined in the learning resources, but I am unsure where the configuration might be missing or incorrect. Could you please guide me on what might be causing this repeated login prompt and how to resolve it?
Thank you in advance for your support.


Trust Config:

XS-APP.JSON:

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/sap/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/$1",
      "destination": "abap-cloud-abap-cc2459batrial-dev",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/test-resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}
XS-SECURITY.JSON code:
{
  "xsappname": "travelapp",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "description": "Security profile of called application",
  "scopes": [],
  "role-templates": []
}
MTA.YAML:

_schema-version: "3.2"
ID: travelapp
description: Generated by Fiori Tools
version: 0.0.1
modules:
- name: travelapp-destination-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  requires:
  - name: travelapp-destination-service
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  - name: travelapp-repo-host
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: travelapp-repo-host-key
  - name: travelapp-uaa
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: travelapp-uaa-key
  parameters:
    content:
      instance:
        destinations:
        - Name: travelapp_html_repo_host
          ServiceInstanceName: travelapp-html5-service
          ServiceKeyName: travelapp-repo-host-key
          sap.cloud.service: travelapp
        - Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
          Name: travelapp_uaa
          ServiceInstanceName: travelapp-xsuaa-service
          ServiceKeyName: travelapp-uaa-key
          sap.cloud.service: travelapp
        existing_destinations_policy: update
  build-parameters:
    no-source: true
- name: travelapp-app-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: .
  requires:
  - name: travelapp-repo-host
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  build-parameters:
    build-result: resources
    requires:
    - artifacts:
      - travelapp.zip
      name: travelapp
      target-path: resources/
- name: travelapp
  type: html5
  path: .
  build-parameters:
    build-result: dist
    builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm install
    - npm run build:cf
    supported-platforms: []
resources:
- name: travelapp-destination-service
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
      init_data:
        instance:
          destinations:
          - Authentication: NoAuthentication
            Name: ui5
            ProxyType: Internet
            Type: HTTP
            URL: https://ui5.sap.com
          existing_destinations_policy: update
      version: 1.0.0
    service: destination
    service-name: travelapp-destination-service
    service-plan: lite
- name: travelapp-uaa
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    path: ./xs-security.json
    service: xsuaa
    service-name: travelapp-xsuaa-service
    service-plan: application
- name: travelapp-repo-host
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: html5-apps-repo
    service-name: travelapp-html5-service
    service-plan: app-host
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
SAP BTP ABAP environment SAP Fiori Makers

entry.title: [RAP110] No Exist Class 'ZDMO_GEN_RAP110_SINGLE'
entry.content:
I using BTP Cockpit Trial for study RAP110

But i can't generate class 'ZDMO_GEN_RAP110_SINGLE' is not exist

please give me code.... or link please

entry.title: Unable to open BAS in BTP Trail account getting error as "no healthy upstream"
entry.content:
Hi Team,

               For the past few days, I haven’t been able to open BAS in my BTP trial account. I keep getting the error message: ‘no healthy upstream’. Has anyone else faced this issue or knows how to resolve it?

SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP 

Regards,

Thangam

entry.title: Temporary Login Delay after ABAP Trial 2602 Upgrade
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We want to inform you about a known issue affecting new ABAP Trial service instances following this weekend’s 2602 upgrade.

What’s happening:
Users who provision a new ABAP Trial instance from the SAP BTP Marketplace after the upgrade may experience a temporary delay before they can successfully log in for the first time.

Who is affected:
This issue only impacts newly created ABAP Trial instances. If you already have an existing ABAP Trial service instance, you are not affected and can continue working as usual.

Expected behavior:
Initial login access may take up to one hour after instance creation completes. Subsequent logins will not be affected.

Recommended action:
If you’re creating a new ABAP Trial instance this weekend or next week, please allow up to 60 minutes after provisioning before attempting your first login. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Resolution timeline:
Our team is actively working on a resolution, which is expected to be deployed by Tuesday, February 17th. We’ll update this thread once the issue is fully addressed.

Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Best regards,
Paul

entry.title: Connection BAS to TRL instance (Abap trial), Cloud Trial Cockpit environment
entry.content:
Hello

I´m trying to connect BAS to the TRL instance (Abap in cloud trial cockpit environment) and it´s not possible due to error message:
"Authentication incorrect. Please check the SAP BTP destination authentication configuration."

I followed all the suggested steps,

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/connection-bas-to-trl-instance-abap-trial-cloud-trial-cockpit-environment/qaa-p/14299628#M4934329

but I'm still receiving this message in my SAP Trial account..

Could you help me?

entry.title: Unable to create ABAP trail instance in BTP trail account
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you please help me purge my ABAP trail account so that I can create a new one?  I keep getting the error below even when I try to create the instance manually.

 

Creating a service instance for the entitlements below failed:
  • ABAP environment, Plan : shared
Creating service key(s) for the service instances(s) below failed:
  • abap-trial, Plan : shared
Solution:
Navigate to service instance and trigger creation manually.
 
Thanks
Lokesh

entry.title: Can't create package in ZLOCAL in shared instance SAP BTP Free Trail
entry.content:
Ignore the question - I found solution, I just have updated my ADT tool to last version and issue is gone.

Hi, Colleagues,

I have just executed booster 'Prepare Account for ABAP Trail' and logged into system via Eclipse. I can't create subpackage under ZLOCAL.  The button 'Finish' is disabled and when I try to hit the button 'Next', I just stay on the same screen and no errors are got. 

Trail in US region:

I see others packages are adding, but I can't create. Any help, colleagues?

entry.title: Initial App Update Taking Long - (Standard SSAM v2511.0.0 // SSAM v2505/2405 on S/4HANA)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Currently, we are accessing the SAP Service Asset Manager standard application(v2511.0.0) on S/4HANA. After scanning the app QR code, the initial app update has been taking a long time, and the app update pop-up is also delayed.

• S/4HANA
• SSAM versions: 2405 and 2505
• Standard client application version: 2511.0.0



Could you please advise how we can resolve this issue? Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Kingston A.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: How to get the URL of the OdataService generated by CDS
entry.content:
Hello Guys!

I am developing in the Business application studio for quite some time Hana CDS views and I have started to generate Odata Services. 

I know what is the url of the main branch for testing the odata service but right now If I want to test an Odata Service I have to merge back my development into the main branch to test it out.

My questions is how to the get URL for the service that exists in my own development hana container.
I would like to test my services before merging but this is impossible I have know clue where to look for the URL

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Unable to Update Data in Custom External S/4HANA OData Service (SSAM2405)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to integrate an additional external S/4HANA OData service (our own custom service) into the standard SAP Service and Asset Manager (SSAM) 2405 application.

Steps we followed:

  1. Created a destination in SAP Mobile Services for our external S/4HANA service.

     2. Added the service to the standard SSAM metadata by creating a new service in the Z component  

           

     3. After synchronization, the service metadata was generated successfully (XML created without errors)

     4. We are able to read data from the backend service successfully in the application

Issue:

When we try to update data from the Edit page, the Save action triggers the OData Update action, but the data is not updated. We are receiving an Internal Server Error.

In the backend traces, only GET requests are being triggered. There are no POST or PUT requests being sent during the update operation.

 

Question:

Is it supported to use a custom external S/4HANA OData service within the standard SSAM metadata?

If yes:

  • Are there any additional configuration steps required to update the data? Have we missed anything?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Kingston A.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: Technical Issue: Authentication Popup in SAP Build Work Zone (Destination: abap-cloud-default)
entry.content:
I am currently encountering a persistent "Sign in" authentication prompt while accessing the "Simple App" within the SAP Build Work Zone (Trial environment).

Despite having the destination abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-fae783bdtrial-dev configured with OAuth2UserTokenExchange, the application is requesting manual credentials instead of passing the SSO token.

Technical Details:

  • Destination Name: abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-fae783bdtrial-dev

  • Authentication Type: OAuth2UserTokenExchange

  • Error Manifestation: Pop-up requesting Username/Password for the ABAP instance URL.

 Has anyone encountered this or found a solution? I would appreciate any insights. Thank you in advance!








_schema-version: "3.2"
ID: sample
description: Generated by Fiori Tools
version: 0.0.1
modules:
- name: sample-destination-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  requires:
  - name: sample-destination-service
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  - name: sample-repo-host
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: sample-repo-host-key
  - name: sample-uaa
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: sample-uaa-key
  parameters:
    content:
      instance:
        destinations:
        - Name: sample_html_repo_host
          ServiceInstanceName: sample-html5-service
          ServiceKeyName: sample-repo-host-key
          sap.cloud.service: sample
        - Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
          Name: sample_uaa
          ServiceInstanceName: sample-xsuaa-service
          ServiceKeyName: sample-uaa-key
          sap.cloud.service: sample
        existing_destinations_policy: update
  build-parameters:
    no-source: true
- name: sample-app-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: .
  requires:
  - name: sample-repo-host
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  build-parameters:
    build-result: resources
    requires:
    - artifacts:
      - sample.zip
      name: sample
      target-path: resources/
- name: sample
  type: html5
  path: .
  build-parameters:
    build-result: dist
    builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm install
    - npm run build:cf
    supported-platforms: []
resources:
- name: sample-destination-service
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
      init_data:
        instance:
          destinations:
          - Authentication: NoAuthentication
            Name: ui5
            ProxyType: Internet
            Type: HTTP
            URL: https://ui5.sap.com
          existing_destinations_policy: update
      version: 1.0.0
    service: destination
    service-name: sample-destination-service
    service-plan: lite
- name: sample-uaa
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    path: ./xs-security.json
    service: xsuaa
    service-name: sample-xsuaa-service
    service-plan: application
- name: sample-repo-host
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: html5-apps-repo
    service-name: sample-html5-service
    service-plan: app-host
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true

entry.title: Unpublish Service Binding hangs ... in progress
entry.content:
Hello,

In Eclipse connected to a BTP ABAP Environment I pushed the button Unpublish. The status went to:  "Publish/Unpublish operation in progress. Do not modify, close or refresh the Service Binding.".

Even after one hour it still had this status. After restarting Eclipse and even after restarting the ABAP Instance it still has this status.

When I reopen the Service Binding in Eclipse my mouse cursor is a "Spinning wheel" cursor, so that nothing can be done.

Deleting the Service Binding is not possible. It will show "Service Binding <> has published local service endpoint(s)".

How can it be solved?

entry.title: Released CDS View for Sales Price Condition Records with Material ID, in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

System : SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

We are building an external OData API in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
Our goal is to merge Sales Pricing data with Inventory (Material Stock)
data into a single API for downstream consumption.

GOAL:
Expose a combined Stock + Sales Price API by joining:
- I_MaterialStock_2 (inventory/stock levels per plant & storage location)
- A Sales Price CDS view (with Material ID as the join key)

PROBLEM:
The only relevant released CDS view we found is I_SlsPrcgConditionRecord
— but it does NOT include the Material / Product field.
Without Material ID, we cannot join pricing data with stock data
at the material level.

ALREADY CHECKED:
- I_SlsPrcgConditionRecord — no Material ID field
- I_SlsPrcgConditionRecordValidity — Material ID not consistently exposed
- SAP API Business Hub (api.sap.com) — no suitable released OData service found
- SAP Help Portal and SAP Notes — no workaround found

DESIRED API DATA MODEL (illustrative):

SELECT
s.Material,
s.Plant,
s.StorageLocation,
s.MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit AS StockQuantity,
p.ConditionRateValue AS SalesPrice,
p.TransactionCurrency,
p.ConditionValidityEndDate
FROM I_MaterialStock_2 AS s
JOIN <Missing Sales Price CDS> AS p ON s.Material = p.Material

REQUIRED FIELDS from the missing Sales Price CDS view:
- Material / Product (mandatory join key)
- ConditionType (e.g. PR00)
- ConditionRateValue (price amount)
- TransactionCurrency
- SalesOrganization / DistributionChannel (for filtering)
- ConditionValidityStartDate / ConditionValidityEndDate

QUESTIONS:
1. Does a released CDS view exist that exposes Sales Price
Condition Records WITH Material ID?
2. If not, is SAP planning to release one  and when?
3. What is the SAP-recommended approach to join I_MaterialStock_2
with Sales Price data for an external-facing OData API?
4. If a custom approach is needed, is RAP/BTP extensibility
the right pattern within S/4HANA Cloud boundaries?

We have exhausted all self-service options before posting here.
Any guidance from the community or SAP experts is greatly appreciated!

Thank you.

Rudhra

entry.title: Enable Offline Store for Online OData Service in SAP MDK
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently using an online OData service ( S/4HANA) - SSAM2405, but I would like to enable an offline store option so that functions like updates can be performed offline, similar to how offline services work.

This screenshot shows the offline service

Is there a way to enable offline store directly for an online OData service? If not, are there any alternatives or best practices to use an online service in a local/offline store?

Any guidance or suggestions would be highly appreciated.
Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Kingston A.
